Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}Yeah, this is it! I'm sure they won't mind if we borrow this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}Are you sure? The word looks shorter than that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 4 25 25}What!? Are you trying to scare me or something?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 2 25 25}{f 4 23 0 2 2 25 25}You better watch out. What goes around comes around, buddy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 0 0 0}DEV: *Unused message labels. [n]{f 1 5 0}*If this appears, it is a bug.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}Okay, let's go. We're supposed to meet up with everyone in the main hallway.[n]{f 1 1}
